amazon_product_details_section.Item model number\n: ‎ Oral-B Têtes de brosse Precision Cl

features: Removes up to 100% more bacterial plaque for cleaner teeth and healthier gums vs. a manual toothbrush
Only genuine Oral-B brush heads feature X-shape bristles that clean in areas that regular ones cannot reach for optimal cleaning efficacy
Oral-B Precision Clean features 3 types of bristles size for precise clean
Guaranteed fit with Oral-B electric rechargeable toothbrushes except Pulsonic & iO toothbrushes
Brush head usage indicator: bristles turn from green to yellow reminding you when to change to keep 100% cleaning efficacy
Oral-B is #1 brand most used by dentists worldwide with clinically proven results
description: Product Description The Oral-B Pro Precision Clean toothbrush head bristles brush away plaque for a superior tooth-by-tooth clean than with a regular manual toothbrush. Oral-B genuine brush heads are designed with new X-shape bristles that clean in areas that round ones cannot reach. Its brush head usage indicator turns bristles from green to yellow showing you when to change for 100% cleaning efficacy. Guaranteed fit with Oral-B electric rechargeable toothbrushes except Pulsonic & iO toothbrushes. Directions 1. Open the packaging. 2. Insert the brush head into the Oral-B electric toothbrush. 3. Gently brush teeth in circular motions for at least 2 minutes. 4. Rinse the brush head after use. 5. Change the brush head every 3 months or when the bristles flat. Safety Warning This item is not suitable for children use. Small replacement heads may pose choking hazard if children swallow them Manufacturer Contact Information Braun GmbH Sulzbacher Straße 40, 65824 Schwalbach am Taunus See more
